name: 2-hydroxy-7-methoxy-5-methyl-naphthalene-1-carboxylic acid meso-2,5-dihydroxy-cyclopent-3-enyl ester
description: 2-hydroxy-7-methoxy-5-methyl-naphthalene-1-carboxylic acid meso-2,5-dihydroxy-cyclopent-3-enyl ester is a solid. This compound belongs to the naphthalenecarboxylic acids and derivatives. These are compounds containing a napthalene moiety with a ring carbon which bears a carboxylic acid group or a derivative. This drug targets the protein neocarzinostatin.
